summary: Tested ZET Mindshare iteration 20 features: Mirror tool (scaleX/scaleY transform), Eraser tool (trail visualization + element deletion), Zoom tool (smaller default values), and Subscription modal (Plus/Pro/Ultra plans). All core features working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Translation keys showing instead of text: 'choosePlan', 'planDescription', 'subscriptionNote', 'selectPlan' - missing translations in LanguageContext.js

passed_tests: User registration and login flow works
Dashboard loads correctly with Documents/Notes tabs
Settings menu opens with Subscription button (data-testid='subscription-btn')
Subscription modal displays 3 plans: Plus ($9.99), Pro ($19.99 - RECOMMENDED), Ultra ($39.99)
All subscription plan features are visible
Editor loads with all tools in toolbox
Shape tools (triangle, square, circle, star, ring) are available
Mirror tool opens 'Mirror / Rotate' panel with horizontal/vertical flip buttons and rotation slider
Mirror tool shows 'Select an element first' message correctly when no element selected
Eraser tool shows red dashed circle trail during erasing (rgba(255,100,100,0.3) circles)
Eraser removes both draw paths and canvas elements on mouseup
Zoom tool panel shows lens size slider (30-120px range), In/Out buttons, and magnifier display
Zoom magnifier circle appears on canvas showing zoom percentage
Shape rendering uses CSS transform: scaleX/scaleY for mirror effect (CanvasArea.js line 710)
action_items: Add missing translations in LanguageContext.js: choosePlan, planDescription, subscriptionNote, selectPlan, recommended (for both 'en' and 'tr')
critical_code_review_comments: CanvasArea.js line 706-710: scaleX/scaleY transform correctly applied to elements with transformOrigin: 'center center'
CanvasArea.js line 456-471: Eraser logic correctly removes draw paths and canvas elements based on eraserTrail intersection
CanvasArea.js line 658-664: Eraser trail visualization correctly renders red dashed circles during erasing
Editor.js line 152-153: Zoom defaults set to zoomLevel=1.5 and zoomRadius=50 (reasonable smaller values)
Dashboard.js line 54-82: SUBSCRIPTION_PLANS array correctly defines Plus/Pro/Ultra with all features
Dashboard.js line 706-761: Subscription modal renders 3 plan cards with data-testid attributes
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created via registration
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 tested: (1) Mirror tool correctly opens panel with flip/rotate options and applies scaleX/scaleY CSS transforms, (2) Eraser tool shows red dashed circle trail during drag and removes elements on mouseup, (3) Zoom tool has smaller default values (1.5x zoom, 50px radius) and shows magnifier circle, (4) Subscription modal shows 3 plans with correct pricing. Minor issue: translation keys showing in subscription modal.

features_verified.mirror_tool_panel: VERIFIED - Opens Mirror/Rotate panel with horizontal/vertical flip buttons
features_verified.mirror_scaleX_scaleY: VERIFIED - CanvasArea.js applies transform: scaleX/scaleY correctly
features_verified.eraser_trail: VERIFIED - Red dashed circles shown during erasing
features_verified.eraser_element_removal: VERIFIED - Code logic removes canvas elements intersecting with eraser trail
features_verified.zoom_magnifier: VERIFIED - Magnifier circle visible showing zoom percentage
features_verified.subscription_modal: VERIFIED - 3 plans (Plus/Pro/Ultra) with correct prices and features
features_verified.subscription_data_testid: VERIFIED - plan-plus, plan-pro, plan-ultra, select-plan-* attributes present
